nodes.label: Garden arrest: I am → fall back → protection → cup
Trials: Annas + Pilate → truth/kingdom → Barabbas chosen

hinges.identity_□: Jesus is the true King whose kingdom is not of this world.
hinges.enactment_◇: He steps forward, protects disciples, submits to the cup, and testifies to truth before Pilate.
hinges.effect_Δ: Peter collapses into denial; the crowd chooses Barabbas; the world’s court rejects the true King.
